title: The Man Who Saw the Bear
original_title: L’Homme qui a vu l’ours qui a vu l’homme
overview: Two men from different generations form an unlikely bond while protecting a runaway circus bear in the French countryside, discovering shared passions for nature and wisdom along the way.

trailers.title: L'HOMME QUI A VU L'OURS QUI A VU L'HOMME Bande Annonce (2025) Pierre Richard
